productDisplayName: Nike Women Purple Lunarlite +2 Sports Shoes
description: The nike LunarElite+ 2 range of shoes for women are made of environmentally preferred rubber and employ a modified waffle outsole that makes the shoes durable and multi-surface tractional. The heel unit is made of highly durable carbon rubber, reducing wear and tear, while the flex grooves enhance flexibility, ensuring a smooth and efficient nike run.UpperMesh upper for maximum breathability and lightweight comfortMeshed bootie for added ventilation and to provide a snug, cushioned FitSynthetic overlays for midfoot support and added shoe structureFlywire technology on the upper for lightweight structure to the upper and to enhance shoe durabilitySwoosh overlays on the ankles for styleLace-up system for snug, customised fitCushioned and meshed collar and tongue for added comfort and snug fitMidsoleLunarlon midsole for ample cushioning, impact protection and lightweight comfortDynamic Support in the heel for a cushioned heel-strike and toe-offFitsole footbed with perforations on the midfoot for enhanced cushioning, customised fit, added support to the heel and breathabilityRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole for durabilityWaffle pattern lugs in the forefoot and midfoot periphery for maximum grip and tractionBRS 1000 rubber used in the heel for drag protection and enhanced shoe lifeScooped heel for better impact protectionNike+ unit for use of compatible devicesOutsole extended onto the upper as a toe guard for better forefoot protectionShoe careBrush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
